---
title: LibreOffice preservation fixture
license: CC0-1.0
---

## Source constructs {#source-constructs}

This small document is a public-domain fixture for testing Open Packaging
Conventions and WordprocessingML preservation.

- First list item
- Second list item

| Construct | Expected value |
|-----------|----------------|
| Heading   | Preserved       |
| Table     | Preserved       |

Follow the [internal link](#second-section) or visit the
[external link](https://example.org/).

::: {.section-appendix page-break="true"
footer-left="Second section" footer-right="Page {page}"}

## Second section {#second-section}

This section begins after a section break and uses a different footer label.

:::
